            "text": "            {{/*"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "            \u003cli class=\"mr-4 inline-block\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "              \u003ca href=\"{{ &#96;authors/&#96; | relLangURL }}{{ .Params.Author | urlize }}/\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "                {{ partial \"components/icon\" (dict \"Name\" \"circle-user\" \"Class\" \"inline-block h-4 w-4 mr-2 align-[-2px]\") }}{{ .Params.author }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "              \u003c/a\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "            \u003c/li\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "            */}}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "            \u003cli class=\"mr-4 block\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "              {{ partial \"components/icon\" (dict \"Name\" \"clock\" \"Class\" \"inline-block h-4 w-4 mr-1 align-[-2px]\") }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "              {{ time.Format \":date_long\" .PublishDate }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "            \u003c/li\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "            {{ $categories:= .Params.categories }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "            {{ if $categories }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "            \u003cli class=\"mr-4 inline-block\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "              {{ partial \"components/icon\" (dict \"Name\" \"folder\" \"Class\" \"inline-block h-4 w-4 mr-1 align-[-2px]\") }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "              {{ range $i,$p:= $categories }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "              \u003ca href=\"{{ &#96;categories/&#96; | relLangURL }}{{ . | urlize | lower }}/\" class=\"\"\u003e{{/* . | humanize */}}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "                {{ . | title }}{{ if ne $i"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "                (sub (len $categories) 1) }}{{ \",\" }}{{ end }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "              \u003c/a\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "              {{ end }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "            \u003c/li\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "            {{ end }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "          \u003c/ul\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "          {{/* Mobile TOC - appears after meta but before content*/}}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "          {{ if $hasToc }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "          \u003cdiv class=\"toc-wrapper border rounded p-4 relative z-10 mb-6 lg:hidden\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "            \u003cbutton"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "              type=\"button\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "              id=\"mobile-toc-toggle\""
          }

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "{{ define \"main\" }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "  {{ partial \"page-header\" . }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "  \u003csection class=\"section\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "    \u003cdiv class=\"container\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "      \u003cdiv class=\"row gx-5\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "        \u003c!-- blog posts --\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "        \u003cdiv class=\"lg:col-8\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "          \u003cdiv class=\"row\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "            {{ $paginator:= .Paginate .RegularPages }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "            {{ range $paginator.Pages }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "              \u003cdiv class=\"md:col-6 mb-14\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "                {{ partial \"components/blog-card\" . }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "              \u003c/div\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "            {{ end }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "          \u003c/div\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "          {{ partial \"components/pagination.html\" . }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "        \u003c/div\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "        \u003c!-- sidebar --\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "        \u003cdiv class=\"lg:col-4\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "          \u003c!-- widget --\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "          {{ $widget:= site.Params.widgets.sidebar }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "          {{ partialCached \"widgets/widget-wrapper\" ( dict \"Widgets\" $widget \"Scope\" . ) }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "        \u003c/div\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "      \u003c/div\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "    \u003c/div\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "  \u003c/section\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "{{ end }}"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 29
          },
          "startPosition": {}

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "{{ define \"main\" }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "  \u003csection class=\"section-sm pb-0\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "    \u003cdiv class=\"container\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "      \u003cdiv"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "        class=\"row border-divider justify-center border-b pb-14\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "        \u003cdiv class=\"lg:col-4 text-center\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "          {{ $image:= .Params.image }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "          {{ if $image }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "            {{ partial \"image\" (dict \"Src\" $image \"Context\" .Page \"Alt\" .Title \"Class\" \"mx-auto\" \"Size\" \"200x200\") }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "          {{ else if .Params.Email }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "            \u003cimg"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "              class=\"mx-auto\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "              alt=\"{{ .Title }}\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "              height=\"200\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "              width=\"200\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "              src=\"https://www.gravatar.com/avatar/{{ md5 .Params.email }}?s=128\u0026pg\u0026d=identicon\" /\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "          {{ end }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "          \u003ch1 class=\"h3 mt-10\"\u003e{{ .Title }}\u003c/h1\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "          \u003cdiv class=\"content mt-6\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "            {{ .Content }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "          \u003c/div\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "          \u003cul class=\"social-icons ml-4 mt-10 text-center\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "            {{ range .Params.social }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "              \u003cli\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "                \u003ca"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "                  href=\"{{ .link | safeURL }}\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "                  target=\"_blank\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "                  rel=\"noopener nofollow\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "                  \u003cspan class=\"sr-only\"\u003e{{ .title }}\u003c/span\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "                  {{ partial \"components/icon\" (dict \"Name\" .icon) }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "                \u003c/a\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "              \u003c/li\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "            {{ end }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "          \u003c/ul\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "        \u003c/div\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "      \u003c/div\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "      \u003cdiv class=\"row pb-16 pt-14\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "        {{ $filterByAuthor := where site.RegularPages \"Params.author\" \"==\" .Title }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "        {{ range $filterByAuthor }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "          \u003cdiv class=\"md:col-6 lg:col-4 mb-12\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "            {{ partial \"components/blog-card\" . }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "          \u003c/div\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "        {{ end }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "      \u003c/div\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "    \u003c/div\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "  \u003c/section\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "{{ end }}"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 48
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./themes/jorap/layouts/authors/single.html",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "\u003csection class=\"section section--blog-list\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "    \u003cdiv class=\"container\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "        \u003cdiv class=\"row gx-5\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "            \u003c!-- blog posts --\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "            \u003cdiv class=\"lg:col-12\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "                \u003cdiv class=\"row\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "                    \u003cdiv class=\"mb-12 w-full md:col-12\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "                        {{ partial \"sections/home-intro.html\" . }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "                        {{ $homeIntro := site.Params.home_intro }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "                        {{ if and $homeIntro $homeIntro.enable }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "                        \u003ch1 class=\"text-h2-sm font-bold tracking-tight text-ink md:text-h2 md:text-left\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "                            Latest Blog Posts"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "                        \u003c/h1\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "                        {{ else }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "                        \u003ch1 class=\"text-h1-sm font-bold tracking-tight text-ink md:text-h1 md:text-left\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "                            Latest Blog Posts"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "                        \u003c/h1\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "                        {{ end }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "                    \u003c/div\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "                    {{ $blogPages := where site.RegularPages \"Section\" \"blog\" }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "                    {{ $sortedPages := $blogPages.ByDate.Reverse }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "                    {{ $recentPosts := first 12 $sortedPages }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "                    {{ range $i, $post := $recentPosts }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "                    \u003cdiv class=\"md:col-6 lg:col-4 mb-14\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "                        {{ partial \"components/blog-card\" (dict \"Page\" $post \"Eager\" (eq $i 0)) }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "                    \u003c/div\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "                    {{ end }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "                \u003c/div\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "            \u003c/div\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "        \u003c/div\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "    \u003c/div\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "\u003c/section\u003e"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 10,
            "line": 31
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./themes/jorap/layouts/_partials/sections/blog-list.html",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.30559059977531433
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "{{/*"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "  components/blog-card — Renders a single blog card."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "  Accepts either:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "    - A Page directly: {{ partial \"components/blog-card\" . }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "    - A dict for explicit control:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "        {{ partial \"components/blog-card\" (dict \"Page\" . \"Eager\" true \"HeadingLevel\" 3) }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "  Only set Eager=true for the LCP candidate (typically the first card on"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "  the home page). Every other card MUST stay lazy/auto so the browser can"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "  prioritize the hero image without bandwidth contention. Marking all"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "  cards eager/high-priority was actively hurting LCP."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "  HeadingLevel defaults to 2 so cards sit beneath a page-level h1. Pass"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "  3 when the card is rendered inside a section that already has its own"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "  h2 (e.g. \"Related posts\" on blog/single.html) to preserve a sequential"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "  heading order for accessibility."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "*/}}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "{{- $page := . -}}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "{{- $eager := false -}}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "{{- $headingLevel := 2 -}}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "{{- if reflect.IsMap . -}}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "  {{- $page = .Page -}}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "  {{- $eager = .Eager | default false -}}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "  {{- with .HeadingLevel -}}{{- $headingLevel = . -}}{{- end -}}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "{{- end -}}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "{{- $headingTag := printf \"h%d\" $headingLevel -}}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "{{/*"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "  Go's html/template (which Hugo uses) auto-escapes dynamic HTML tag"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "  names — writing &#96;\u003c{{ $headingTag }}\u003e&#96; literally renders as &#96;\u0026lt;h2\u0026gt;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "  text on the page. Build the open/close tags as strings and pipe them"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "  through &#96;safeHTML&#96; so they render as real elements."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "*/}}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "{{- $headingOpen := printf \"\u003c%s class=\\\"mb-3 text-2xl text-balance font-primary\\\"\u003e\" $headingTag | safeHTML -}}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "{{- $headingClose := printf \"\u003c/%s\u003e\" $headingTag | safeHTML -}}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "{{- with $page -}}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "\u003cdiv"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "  class=\"component--blog-card flex h-full flex-col overflow-hidden rounded-xl border border-divider bg-elevated shadow-sm transition-[box-shadow,border-color] duration-300 ease-out motion-reduce:transition-none motion-reduce:hover:shadow-sm hover:shadow-md\"\u003e"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 38
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./themes/jorap/layouts/_partials/components/blog-card.html",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.29704681038856506
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "/* Add margin below Hugo YouTube shortcode embeds (robust selector) */"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "/* Target divs with inline style matching the YouTube embed container */"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "/* Robust selectors for YouTube embed containers (handles spacing variations) */"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "div[style*=\"position: relative\"][style*=\"padding-bottom:56.25%\"],"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "div[style*=\"position:relative\"][style*=\"padding-bottom:56.25%\"],"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "div[style*=\"position: relative\"][style*=\"padding-bottom: 56.25%\"],"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "div[style*=\"position:relative\"][style*=\"padding-bottom: 56.25%\"] {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "/* If a class is used for YouTube embeds, add a rule here as well (uncomment and adjust as needed) */"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "/*"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": ".youtube-embed {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "*/"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "/* Dark mode prose: align with theme tokens instead of flat pure white."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": " * Excludes &#96;.btn&#96; anchors so button variants keep their own text colors"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": " * (otherwise btn-primary text was forced to a near-white token, going"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": " * invisible against the cream accent fill in dark mode). */"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "html.dark .content p,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "html.dark .content li,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "html.dark .content ul,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "html.dark .content ol,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "html.dark .content td,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "html.dark .content blockquote {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "  color: var(--color-ink-muted) !important;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "html.dark .content h1,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "html.dark .content h2,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "html.dark .content h3,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "html.dark .content h4,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "html.dark .content h5,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "html.dark .content h6 {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "  color: var(--color-ink) !important;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "html.dark .content a:not(.btn) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "  color: var(--color-ink) !important;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "html.dark .content a:not(.btn):hover {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "  color: var(--color-accent) !important;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "/* Tag chips inside &#96;.content&#96; opt out of the prose link colors above so"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": " * their own hover (light text on accent fill) stays readable. */"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "html.dark .content .tags_section a {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "  color: var(--color-ink) !important;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "html.dark .content .tags_section a:hover {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "  color: var(--color-surface) !important;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "html.dark .content strong,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "html.dark .content b {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "  color: var(--color-ink) !important;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "}"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 63

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "{{ define \"main\" }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "  {{ partial \"page-header\" . }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "  \u003csection class=\"section\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "    \u003cdiv class=\"container\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "      \u003cul class=\"text-center\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "        {{/* List terms for the current taxonomy (e.g. categories or tags) */}}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "        {{ range .Data.Terms.ByCount }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "          \u003cli class=\"m-3 inline-block\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "            \u003ca"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "              href=\"{{ .Page.Permalink }}\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "              class=\"bg-elevated text-ink block rounded px-4 py-2 text-xl\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "              {{ .Page.Title }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "              \u003cspan class=\"bg-surface border-divider ml-2 rounded border px-2 text-ink-muted\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "                {{ .Count }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "              \u003c/span\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "            \u003c/a\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "          \u003c/li\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "        {{ end }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "      \u003c/ul\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "    \u003c/div\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "  \u003c/section\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "{{ end }}"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 24
          },
          "startPosition": {}

        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./themes/jorap/layouts/taxonomy.html",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 10986,
            "text": "function renderMarkdown(md) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11054
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11055,
            "text": "    if (inCode \u0026\u0026 codeBuf.length) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11056,
            "text": "      out.push(&#96;\u003cpre\u003e\u003ccode\u003e${escapeHtml(codeBuf.join('\\n'))}\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/pre\u003e&#96;);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11057,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11058,
            "text": "    return out.join('\\n');"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11059,
            "text": "  }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11060
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11061,
            "text": "  function buildListHtml(items, type) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11062,
            "text": "    // Nest by indent (one level deep is plenty for DESIGN.md)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11063,
            "text": "    let html = &#96;\u003c${type}\u003e&#96;;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11064,
            "text": "    let lastIndent = 0;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11065,
            "text": "    for (const it of items) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11066,
            "text": "      if (it.indent \u003e lastIndent) html += &#96;\u003c${type}\u003e&#96;;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11067,
            "text": "      else if (it.indent \u003c lastIndent) html += &#96;\u003c/${type}\u003e&#96;.repeat(lastIndent - it.indent);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11068,
            "text": "      html += &#96;\u003cli\u003e${it.html}\u003c/li\u003e&#96;;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11069,
            "text": "      lastIndent = it.indent;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11070,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11071,
            "text": "    html += &#96;\u003c/${type}\u003e&#96;.repeat(lastIndent + 1);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11072,
            "text": "    return html;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11073,
            "text": "  }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11074
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11075,
            "text": "  function inlineMd(text) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11076,
            "text": "    // Order matters: escape first, then re-inject tags."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11077,
            "text": "    let s = escapeHtml(text);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11078,
            "text": "    // Code spans"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11079,
            "text": "    s = s.replace(/&#96;([^&#96;]+)&#96;/g, (_, code) =\u003e &#96;\u003ccode\u003e${code}\u003c/code\u003e&#96;);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11080,
            "text": "    // Links [text](url)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11081,
            "text": "    s = s.replace(/\\[([^\\]]+)\\]\\(([^)]+)\\)/g, (_, t, u) =\u003e &#96;\u003ca href=\"${u}\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\"\u003e${t}\u003c/a\u003e&#96;);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11082,
            "text": "    // Bold"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11083,
            "text": "    s = s.replace(/\\*\\*([^*]+)\\*\\*/g, '\u003cstrong\u003e$1\u003c/strong\u003e');"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11084,
            "text": "    // Italic (only single *…*, skip if inside bold already handled)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11085,
            "text": "    s = s.replace(/(^|[^*])\\*([^*\\n]+)\\*(?!\\*)/g, '$1\u003cem\u003e$2\u003c/em\u003e');"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11086,
            "text": "    return s;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11087,
            "text": "  }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11088
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11089,
            "text": "  function highlightBold(text) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11090,
            "text": "    return inlineMd(text);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11091,
            "text": "  }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11092
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11093,
            "text": "  function escapeHtml(s) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11094,
            "text": "    return String(s)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11095,
            "text": "      .replace(/\u0026/g, '\u0026amp;')"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11096,
            "text": "      .replace(/\u003c/g, '\u0026lt;')"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11097,
            "text": "      .replace(/\u003e/g, '\u0026gt;')"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11098,
            "text": "      .replace(/\"/g, '\u0026quot;')"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11099,
            "text": "      .replace(/'/g, '\u0026#39;');"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11100,
            "text": "  }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11101
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11102,
            "text": "  function copyToClipboard(text) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11103,
            "text": "    if (!text) return;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11104,
            "text": "    try {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11105,
            "text": "      navigator.clipboard.writeText(text);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11106,
            "text": "      showToast('Copied: ' + text);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11107,
            "text": "    } catch { /* ignore */ }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11108,
            "text": "  }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11109
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11110,
            "text": "  //"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11111,
            "text": "  // Init"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11112,
            "text": "  //"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11113
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11114,
            "text": "  function init() {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11115,
            "text": "    try { history.scrollRestoration = 'manual'; } catch {}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11154,
            "text": "  }"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 11160
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 11
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./.cursor/skills/impeccable/scripts/live-browser.js",
        "signatures": {
          "ranges": [
            {
              "endPosition": {
                "column": 1,
                "line": 12
              },
              "startPosition": {
                "column": 1,
                "line": 12
              }
            },
            {
              "endPosition": {
                "column": 5,
                "line": 10987
              },
              "startPosition": {
                "column": 3,
                "line": 10986
              }
            }
          ]
        }
      },
      "score": 0.2810361385345459

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "\u003cdiv class=\"bg-elevated rounded p-8 text-center\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "  {{ $image:= .Params.image }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "  {{ if $image }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "    {{ partial \"image\" (dict \"Src\" $image \"Context\" .Page \"Alt\" .Title \"Class\" \"mx-auto mb-6 rounded\" \"size\" \"120x120\") }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "  {{ else if .Params.Email }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "    \u003cimg"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "      class=\"mx-auto mb-6 rounded\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "      alt=\"{{ .Title }}\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "      height=\"120\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "      width=\"120\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "      src=\"https://www.gravatar.com/avatar/{{ md5 .Params.email }}?s=128\u0026pg\u0026d=identicon\" /\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "  {{ end }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "  \u003ch4 class=\"mb-3\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "    \u003ca href=\"{{ .RelPermalink }}\"\u003e{{ .Title }}\u003c/a\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "  \u003c/h4\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "  \u003cp class=\"mb-4\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "    {{ .Summary | plainify }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "  \u003c/p\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "  \u003cul class=\"social-icons\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "    {{ range .Params.social }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "      \u003cli\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "        \u003ca href=\"{{ .link | safeURL }}\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener nofollow\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "          \u003cspan class=\"sr-only\"\u003e{{ .title }}\u003c/span\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "          {{ partial \"components/icon\" (dict \"Name\" .icon) }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "        \u003c/a\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "      \u003c/li\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "    {{ end }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "  \u003c/ul\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "\u003c/div\u003e"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 29
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./themes/jorap/layouts/_partials/components/author-card.html",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.2804268002510071
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "  @apply prose-th:relative prose-th:z-10 prose-th:px-4 prose-th:py-[18px] prose-th:text-ink;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "  @apply prose-tr:border-divider;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "  @apply prose-td:relative prose-td:z-10 prose-td:px-3 prose-td:py-[18px] prose-td:text-ink-muted;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "/* Buttons inside prose content: prose-a styles would otherwise force"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": " * text-ink-muted/underline onto buttons. Re-assert each variant's own"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": " * text colors with !important so light + dark mode stay consistent. */"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": ".content .btn {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "  @apply no-underline;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": ".content .btn-primary {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "  @apply !text-on-accent hover:!text-on-accent;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": ".content .btn-outline-primary {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "  @apply !text-ink hover:!text-on-accent;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": ".image--partial {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "  @apply w-full rounded aspect-video object-cover;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "  will-change: transform;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "  content-visibility: auto;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "/* Table of Contents styling */"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "#TableOfContents ol {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "  @apply list-none pl-0;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "#TableOfContents ol ol {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "  @apply pl-4;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "#TableOfContents ol ol ol {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": "  @apply pl-6;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83,
            "text": "#TableOfContents ol ol ol ol {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "text": "  @apply pl-8;"

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "\u003c!-- categories --\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "{{ if isset site.Taxonomies \"categories\" }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "  {{ if not (eq (len site.Taxonomies.categories) 0) }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "    \u003cdiv class=\"mb-8\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "      \u003ch5 class=\"mb-6\"\u003e{{ T \"categories\" | default \"Categories\" }}\u003c/h5\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "      \u003cdiv class=\"bg-elevated rounded p-8\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "        \u003cul class=\"space-y-4\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "          {{ range $name, $items := site.Taxonomies.categories }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "            \u003cli\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "              \u003ca"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "                class=\"text-ink hover:text-accent {{ if (and (eq $.Page.Kind &#96;term&#96;) (eq $.Page.Type &#96;categories&#96;) (eq $.Page.Title .Page.Title)) }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "                  active"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "                {{ end }} flex justify-between\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "                href=\"{{ .Page.RelPermalink }}\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "                {{ .Page.Title }} \u003cspan\u003e( {{ len $items }} )\u003c/span\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "              \u003c/a\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "            \u003c/li\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "          {{ end }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "        \u003c/ul\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "      \u003c/div\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "    \u003c/div\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "  {{ end }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "{{ end }}"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 23
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./themes/jorap/layouts/_partials/widgets/categories.html",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 112,
            "text": "          \u003c/div\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113,
            "text": "        \u003c/div\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114,
            "text": "      \u003c/div\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 115,
            "text": "      {{ end }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116,
            "text": "    \u003c/div\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 118,
            "text": "    {{/* Related posts: Hugo .Related ignores categories unless configured in hugo.toml [related]. */}}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119,
            "text": "    {{ $related := first 3 (.Site.RegularPages.Related .) }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120,
            "text": "    {{ if not $related }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 121,
            "text": "      {{ $blogOthers := complement (slice .) (where site.RegularPages \"Section\" \"blog\") }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 122,
            "text": "      {{ $related = first 3 $blogOthers.ByDate.Reverse }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 123,
            "text": "    {{ end }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 124,
            "text": "    {{ with $related }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125,
            "text": "    \u003cdiv class=\"section pb-0\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 126,
            "text": "      \u003ch2 class=\"h3 mb-6\"\u003e{{ T \"related_posts\" }}\u003c/h2\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127,
            "text": "      \u003cdiv class=\"row\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 128,
            "text": "        {{ range . }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 129,
            "text": "          \u003cdiv class=\"md:col-6 lg:col-4 mb-14\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 130,
            "text": "            {{ partial \"components/blog-card\" (dict \"Page\" . \"HeadingLevel\" 3) }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 131,
            "text": "          \u003c/div\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 132,
            "text": "        {{ end }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 133,
            "text": "      \u003c/div\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 134,
            "text": "    \u003c/div\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 135,
            "text": "    {{ end }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 136,
            "text": "  \u003c/div\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 137,
            "text": "\u003c/section\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 138,
            "text": "{{/* TOC scripting (mobile toggle + scroll-spy) lives in assets/js/toc.js, loaded site-wide via [[params.plugins.js]] in hugo.toml. */}}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 139,
            "text": "{{ end }}"
          }

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 161,
            "text": "- **Card hover** (&#96;shadow-md&#96;): Slightly deeper lift on &#96;.component--blog-card&#96; hover, paired with **unchanged border color** so motion is restrained."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 162,
            "text": "- **Overlay / menu** (&#96;shadow-lg&#96;): Dropdown panels and floating FAB-style controls."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 163
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 164,
            "text": "### Named Rules"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 165
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 166,
            "text": "**The Flat-by-Default Rule.** Do not stack **shadow + heavy border + gradient** on the same block unless one role is clearly primary; default to **flat elevated surface**."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 167
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 168,
            "text": "## Components"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 169
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 170,
            "text": "### Buttons"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 171
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 172,
            "text": "- **Shape:** Default radius **&#96;rounded&#96;** (&#96;4px&#96; / &#96;--radius&#96; default in Tailwind), small variant **&#96;rounded-sm&#96;** (&#96;2px&#96;)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 173,
            "text": "- **Primary:** &#96;bg-primary&#96; / &#96;text-white&#96;, semibold, **&#96;px-5 py-2&#96;**, &#96;border-transparent&#96;, **capitalized** label style in &#96;.btn&#96;."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 174,
            "text": "- **Outline primary:** Transparent fill, **&#96;border-dark&#96;** / &#96;text-text-dark&#96; in light mode; **&#96;dark:border-darkmode-primary&#96;** with light text; hover fills toward primary in both themes per &#96;.btn-outline-primary&#96;."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 175,
            "text": "- **Hover / Focus:** Generic **&#96;transition&#96;** on &#96;.btn&#96;; focus rings on **navigation** use **&#96;focus-visible:ring-2 ring-accent&#96;** with **offset** (see nav), not on every button class by default. Prefer **visible &#96;:focus-visible&#96;** for keyboard users."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 176
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 177,
            "text": "### Chips"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 178
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 179,
            "text": "- **Taxonomy / tags** in widgets use **small rounded pills** (&#96;rounded&#96;, &#96;px-3 py-1&#96;) with **&#96;bg-white&#96;** on elevated panels; not a formal chip system. Keep **one** visual pattern for tags site-wide."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 180
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 181,
            "text": "### Cards / Containers"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 182
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 183,
            "text": "- **Blog card (&#96;component--blog-card&#96;):** **&#96;rounded-xl&#96; (&#96;12px&#96;)**, **&#96;border-divider&#96;**, **&#96;bg-elevated&#96;**, **&#96;shadow-sm&#96;**, **hover &#96;shadow-md&#96;**, **300ms ease-out** on shadow and border. Internal padding **&#96;px-6 pt-5 pb-6&#96;**."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 184,
            "text": "- **Widgets** (categories, tags, author): **&#96;rounded&#96;** or **&#96;rounded-lg&#96;** on **&#96;bg-light&#96; / &#96;dark:bg-darkmode-light&#96;** panels with generous padding (&#96;p-6&#96;–&#96;p-8&#96;)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 185
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 186,
            "text": "### Inputs / Fields"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 187
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 188,
            "text": "- **&#96;form-input&#96; utility:** Full width, **&#96;rounded&#96;**, **&#96;bg-elevated&#96;**, **&#96;px-6 py-4&#96;**, **&#96;text-ink&#96;**, placeholder **&#96;ink-faint&#96;**, **focus border** to **&#96;primary&#96;** / &#96;dark:focus:border-accent&#96;, **transparent ring** (no glow stack)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 189
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 190,
            "text": "### Navigation"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 191
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 192,
            "text": "- **Header:** **&#96;border-b&#96;**, **&#96;bg-surface&#96;**, vertical rhythm **&#96;py-5&#96;**. Brand line uses **&#96;text-2xl&#96; / &#96;xl:text-3xl&#96;** for the site title."
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 192
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 160
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/DESIGN.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.25911009311676025
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "{{ range $i, $e:= .Params.features }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "\u003csection class=\"section {{ if (modBool $i 2) }}bg-gradient{{ end }} section--features\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "  \u003cdiv class=\"container\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "    \u003cdiv class=\"row items-center justify-between\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "      \u003cdiv class=\"mb:md-0 {{ if not (modBool $i 2) }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "            md:order-2"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "          {{ end }} md:col-5 mb-6\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "        {{ partial \"image\" (dict \"Src\" .image \"Alt\" \"feature image\" \"DisplayXL\" \"520x\" \"DisplayLG\" \"425x\" \"DisplayMD\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "        \"360x\") }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "      \u003c/div\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "      \u003cdiv class=\"{{ if not (modBool $i 2) }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "            md:order-1"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "          {{ end }} md:col-7 lg:col-6\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "        \u003ch2 class=\"mb-4\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "          {{ .title | markdownify }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "        \u003c/h2\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "        \u003cp class=\"mb-8 text-lg\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "          {{ .content | markdownify }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "        \u003c/p\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "        \u003cul\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "          {{ range .bulletpoints }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "          \u003cli class=\"relative mb-4 pl-6\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "            {{ partial \"components/icon\" (dict \"Name\" \"check\" \"Class\" \"absolute left-0 top-2 h-4 w-4\") }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "            {{ . | markdownify }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "          \u003c/li\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "          {{ end }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "        \u003c/ul\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "        {{ with .button }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "        {{ if .enable }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "        \u003ca class=\"btn btn-primary mt-6\" href=\"{{ .link | absURL }}\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "          {{ .label }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "          {{ partial \"components/icon\" (dict \"Name\" \"arrow-right\" \"Class\" \"inline-block h-4 w-4 ml-2 align-[-2px]\") }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "        \u003c/a\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "        {{ end }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "        {{ end }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "      \u003c/div\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "    \u003c/div\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "  \u003c/div\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "\u003c/section\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "{{ end }}"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 9,
            "line": 39
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./themes/jorap/layouts/_partials/sections/features.html",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 261,
            "text": "  const highlight = function(el, findings) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 262,
            "text": "    if (el._impeccableOverlay) detachOverlay(el._impeccableOverlay);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 263,
            "text": "    const hasSlop = findings.some(f =\u003e RULE_CATEGORY[f.type || f.id] === 'slop');"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 264
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 265,
            "text": "    const fixed = isInFixedContext(el);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 266,
            "text": "    const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 267,
            "text": "    const outline = document.createElement('div');"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 268,
            "text": "    outline.className = 'impeccable-overlay';"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 269,
            "text": "    outline._targetEl = el;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 270,
            "text": "    outline._isFixed = fixed;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 271,
            "text": "    Object.assign(outline.style, {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 272,
            "text": "      position: fixed ? 'fixed' : 'absolute',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 273,
            "text": "      top: fixed ? &#96;${rect.top - 2}px&#96; : &#96;${rect.top + scrollY - 2}px&#96;,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 274,
            "text": "      left: fixed ? &#96;${rect.left - 2}px&#96; : &#96;${rect.left + scrollX - 2}px&#96;,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 275,
            "text": "      width: &#96;${rect.width + 4}px&#96;, height: &#96;${rect.height + 4}px&#96;,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 276,
            "text": "      zIndex: '99999', boxSizing: 'border-box',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 277,
            "text": "    });"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 278
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 279,
            "text": "    // Build per-finding label entries: ✦ prefix for slop"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 280,
            "text": "    const entries = findings.map(f =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 281,
            "text": "      const name = TYPE_LABELS[f.type || f.id] || f.type || f.id;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 282,
            "text": "      const prefix = RULE_CATEGORY[f.type || f.id] === 'slop' ? '\\u2726 ' : '';"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 283,
            "text": "      return { name: prefix + name, detail: f.detail || f.snippet };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 284,
            "text": "    });"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 285,
            "text": "    const allText = entries.map(e =\u003e e.name).join(', ');"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 286
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 287,
            "text": "    const label = document.createElement('div');"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 288,
            "text": "    label.className = 'impeccable-label';"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 289,

          {
            "lineNumber": 3460,
            "text": "  const highlight = function(el, findings) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3461,
            "text": "    if (el._impeccableOverlay) detachOverlay(el._impeccableOverlay);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3462,
            "text": "    const hasSlop = findings.some(f =\u003e RULE_CATEGORY[f.type || f.id] === 'slop');"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3463
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3464,
            "text": "    const fixed = isInFixedContext(el);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3465,
            "text": "    const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3466,
            "text": "    const outline = document.createElement('div');"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3467,
            "text": "    outline.className = 'impeccable-overlay';"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3468,
            "text": "    outline._targetEl = el;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3469,
            "text": "    outline._isFixed = fixed;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3470,
            "text": "    Object.assign(outline.style, {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3471,
            "text": "      position: fixed ? 'fixed' : 'absolute',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3472,
            "text": "      top: fixed ? &#96;${rect.top - 2}px&#96; : &#96;${rect.top + scrollY - 2}px&#96;,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3473,
            "text": "      left: fixed ? &#96;${rect.left - 2}px&#96; : &#96;${rect.left + scrollX - 2}px&#96;,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3474,
            "text": "      width: &#96;${rect.width + 4}px&#96;, height: &#96;${rect.height + 4}px&#96;,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3475,
            "text": "      zIndex: '99999', boxSizing: 'border-box',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3476,
            "text": "    });"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3477
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3478,
            "text": "    // Build per-finding label entries: ✦ prefix for slop"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3479,
            "text": "    const entries = findings.map(f =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3480,
            "text": "      const name = TYPE_LABELS[f.type || f.id] || f.type || f.id;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3481,
            "text": "      const prefix = RULE_CATEGORY[f.type || f.id] === 'slop' ? '\\u2726 ' : '';"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3482,
            "text": "      return { name: prefix + name, detail: f.detail || f.snippet };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3483,
            "text": "    });"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3484,
            "text": "    const allText = entries.map(e =\u003e e.name).join(', ');"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3485
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3486,
            "text": "    const label = document.createElement('div');"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3487,
            "text": "    label.className = 'impeccable-label';"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3488,
            "text": "    Object.assign(label.style, {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3489,
            "text": "      position: 'absolute', bottom: '100%', left: '-2px',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3490,
            "text": "      display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3491,
            "text": "      whiteSpace: 'nowrap',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3492,
            "text": "      fontSize: '11px', fontWeight: '600', letterSpacing: '0.02em',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3493,
            "text": "      color: LABEL_INK, lineHeight: '14px',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3494,
            "text": "      background: LABEL_BG,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3495,
            "text": "      fontFamily: 'system-ui, sans-serif',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3496,
            "text": "      borderRadius: '4px 4px 0 0',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3497,
            "text": "    });"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3498
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3499,
            "text": "    const textSpan = document.createElement('span');"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3500,
            "text": "    textSpan.style.padding = '3px 8px';"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3501,
            "text": "    textSpan.textContent = allText;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3502,
            "text": "    label.appendChild(textSpan);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3503
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3504,
            "text": "    // State for cycling mode"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3505,
            "text": "    let cycleMode = false;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3506,
            "text": "    let cycleIndex = 0;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3507,
            "text": "    let isHovered = false;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3508,
            "text": "    let prevBtn, nextBtn;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3509
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3510,
            "text": "    function updateCycleText() {"
          },
          {

            "text": "    },"

            "lineNumber": 151,
            "text": "    {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 152,
            "text": "      \"name\": \"Blog Card\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 153,
            "text": "      \"kind\": \"card\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 154,
            "text": "      \"refersTo\": \"blog-card\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 155,
            "text": "      \"description\": \"Listing card with image optional, elevated surface, subtle shadow lift on hover.\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 156,
            "text": "      \"html\": \"\u003carticle class=\\\"ds-blog-card\\\"\u003e\u003cdiv class=\\\"ds-blog-card-body\\\"\u003e\u003ch3 class=\\\"ds-blog-card-title\\\"\u003e\u003ca href=\\\"#\\\"\u003eTitle\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/h3\u003e\u003cp class=\\\"ds-blog-card-excerpt\\\"\u003eExcerpt\u003c/p\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\u003c/article\u003e\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 157,
            "text": "      \"css\": \".ds-blog-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid var(--color-border); background: var(--color-light); box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05); transition: box-shadow 300ms ease-out, border-color 300ms ease-out; } .ds-blog-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1), 0 2px 4px -2px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1); } .dark .ds-blog-card { border-color: var(--color-darkmode-border); background: var(--color-darkmode-light); } .ds-blog-card-body { padding: 20px 24px 24px; flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .ds-blog-card-title a { color: var(--color-text-dark); text-decoration: none; transition: color 200ms ease-out; } .ds-blog-card-title a:hover { color: var(--color-primary); } .dark .ds-blog-card-title a { color: var(--color-darkmode-text-dark); } .dark .ds-blog-card-title a:hover { color: var(--color-darkmode-primary); } .ds-blog-card-excerpt { color: var(--color-text); flex: 1; }\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 158,
            "text": "    },"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 159,
            "text": "    {"
          },
          {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "title: \"Blog Template\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "meta_title: \"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "description: \"Hugo CMS Reference for blog publishing.\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "date: 1981-06-14T05:00:00Z"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "image: \"/images/image-template.jpg\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "categories: [\"Website\", \"Tutorial\"]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "author: \"JoRap\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "tags: [\"Hugo CMS\", \"Markdown\", \"Shortcodes\", \"Frontmatter\", \"Blog Template\", \"Hugo\", \"Content Management\", \"Static Sites\", \"Web Development\"]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "slug: \"blog-template\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "draft: true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "{{\u003c toc \u003e}}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "{{\u003c/* toc */\u003e}}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "Here is an example of headings. You can use this heading by the following markdown rules. For example: use &#96;#&#96; for heading 1 and use &#96;######&#96; for heading 6."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "# Heading 1"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "## Heading 2"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "### Heading 3"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
The tags use `inline-block` with only horizontal padding. There is no vertical gap between rows.

The best fix is to switch the tag list to a flex container with `flex-wrap` and `gap`. This removes the need for `inline-block` and horizontal padding on the list items.

The template loop in `single.html` needs updating to plain `<li>` tags. `components.css` should drop the `inline-block` rules since `gap` now handles spacing. The same change may apply to `widgets/tags.html` for consistency.</details></think>

_**Agent (auto-low)**_

Tags use `inline-block` with only horizontal spacing, so wrapped rows have no vertical gap. Switching the list to flex with `gap` fixes both axes.

_**Agent (auto-low)**_

Tags were laid out with `inline-block` list items and only horizontal padding (`padding-inline-end`), so when they wrapped there was no row spacing.

**Changes:**
1. **`blog/single.html`** — `ul` is now `flex flex-wrap gap-2`; removed `inline-block` from each `li`.
2. **`components.css`** — removed the old horizontal-only spacing rule for `.tags_section ul li.inline-block`.

Wrapped tag rows now get the same `gap-2` (8px) spacing as columns. Rebuild or refresh the site to see it on the Alex Eala post.
